authority.rule: This file is the single source of truth for current system state.
authority.conflict_resolution: If code, README, plans, or agent reports differ from this file, this file wins until formally updated.

policies.existence_rule: Anything not declared here does not officially exist.
policies.roadmap_rule: Roadmap tracks may be declared here as approved direction, but they do not count as implemented state unless their concrete bridges, systems, migrations, and surfaces are separately marked active or implemented.
policies.topic_area_rule: topic_areas are optional. Apps may reference a topic_area or live directly under a dimension.
policies.app_assignment_rule: Every app must declare a dimension. topic_area is optional, surface_kind is required.

local_llm.note: Active local LLM bridge for Week-2 enrichment. Uses local Ollama-backed structured JSON analysis and a separate gold persistence layer.

market_sentiment_pipeline.note: Implemented local pipeline with enrichment and data processing. Not yet declared as fully supported canonical runtime surface.

raw_ingest_foundation.note: Implemented generic Week-1 raw ingestion foundation for markets and news. Persists generic raw batches via the raw-ingest Supabase edge function and raw_ingest_* tables.

local_llm_enrichment_worker.note: Implemented Week-2 local enrichment loop. Claims pending raw items, validates structured local LLM output, and persists gold-layer analysis records.

day_zero_autopilot.note: Implemented Week-4 local Windows autopilot. Runs raw collection first, then local LLM enrichment, with Startup-folder shortcut setup and per-run logging. Executes once per Windows login. No Stripe, paywall, premium gating, or frontend commerce changes are part of this system.

gold_oracle_signal_surface.note: Implemented Week-3 secure frontend surface for authenticated reads from the gold_dashboard_items view. Lives under geld -> oracle_signal, not as a full dashboard widget.

sentinel_daemon.note: Internal monitoring and automation daemon. Real and operative, but not part of the public product promise.

admin_entitlement_cli.note: Local-only entitlement tool for internal profile plan_id changes via Supabase service role.

templates_blueprint.note: Blueprint asset exists on disk and is part of the active meta_generator surface.

autonomy_machine.note: Approved execution roadmap for autonomous ingestion, local enrichment, secure frontend rendering, and local autopilot automation. This track defines direction and sequencing, not blanket implemented state.

week_1_data_pipeline.note: Generic raw-data foundation now exists via raw_ingest_foundation, raw-ingest edge ingestion, and raw_ingest_* Supabase tables. Scheduler orchestration remains outside Week 1 scope.

week_2_local_enrichment.note: Canonical local enrichment layer exists via the active local_llm bridge, raw-item processing states, and a separate gold enrichment table.

week_3_secure_frontend.note: Gold data is exposed through the authenticated gold_dashboard_items view and rendered under geld -> oracle_signal. Dashboard remains a compact cockpit entrypoint only.

week_4_day_zero.note: Day Zero is implemented as pure local automation. The Windows autopilot runs the Week-1 collector and then the Week-2 local LLM worker once per Windows login through a Startup-folder shortcut. Stripe, premium gating, paywalls, and frontend commerce remain intentionally untouched.

documentation_scope.agent_rule_role: behavioral enforcement for analysis and reporting
